name: docks
description: Multi-agent pipeline kit (skills only on Codex — full version with Builder-Verifier slash commands and tiered Opus/Sonnet subagents on Claude Code). 25 portable engineering-convention skills covering test-first / coverage / fix workflows, code review, SOLID, React patterns, dep-vuln triage, design tokens, plans bootstrapping, multi-tool AGENTS.md bridging.
